evidence: Section 2.7: "Feature importance was assessed using Gini importance." Results 3.3 identifies "putative novel drug-resistance mutations" based on high importance ranking (e.g., ethR 579G>C, embA Ala576Thr). Discussion acknowledges known limitation: "the feature weighted model may be biased towards features with higher minor allele frequency. This is also a known existing limitation of RF models using Gini importance measures." The paper ranks mutations by Gini importance to distinguish causal drug-resistance drivers from confounded phylogenetic variants, but lacks permutation or SHAP corroboration.
